name: Workers Comp Appeal Timeline Bountiful

mainEntity.name: How long does a denied workers comp claim take to appeal in Bountiful UT?
mainEntity.text: How long does a denied workers comp claim take to appeal in Bountiful UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: File objection within 20 days of denial; mediation/hearing scheduled in 60-90 days via Labor Commission; full resolution 6-12 months[4].

suggestedAnswer.text: Bountiful denials require 20-day objection to trigger administrative law judge hearing. Gather medical evidence; 70% overturned with attorney. Timeline: application review 30 days, hearing 90 days post. Covers Salt Lake/Davis counties[4].

description: File objection within 20 days of denial; mediation/hearing scheduled in 60-90 days via Labor Commission; full resolution 6-12 months[4].
